title: Interactive CV
description: Ewan Kapoor's interactive CV — experience, skills, education and projects.

tailor.title: Tailor this CV to a role
tailor.placeholder: Paste a role or job description...
tailor.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
tailor.rateLimited: Too many requests - please try again in a few minutes.
tailor.noMatches: No strong matches - showing the full CV.
tailor.pdfFailed: Couldn't generate the tailored PDF - downloaded the standard CV instead.
tailor.explainerBody: This isn't generic AI. It's an agent grounded only in Ewan's real, verified CV - his projects, experience and his own writing. It re-orders and frames what's already true to fit the role you describe; it never invents experience or skills.
